name: merkle audit log: verify-chain detects a deleted line (gap in the chain)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && for i in 1 2 3; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event "e$i" --actor t --data {}; done && sed -i.bak "2d" .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --verify-chain
